response.justification: The candidate is a versatile senior full-stack engineer with 25+ years of hands-on experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, comfortably exceeding the 15-year minimum. However, the role is a director-level IC focused on AI strategy, and the resume shows only light AI exposure (MCP code generators, agent tooling) with no recognized AI expertise, no shipped AI products or platforms of note, no advanced degree in an AI field, and no evidence of strategic advisory work with executives or major customers. The profile reads as a strong staff-level builder rather than a principal-level AI strategist.
strengths: 25+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and low-latency distributed systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of an open-source geo-data platform used in production by NGOs
Strong builder fluency and knowledge-sharing habits (workshops, conference talks, open-source libraries)
concerns: Minimal demonstrated AI/ML depth — no recognized AI expertise or notable AI-powered products
No director-level or strategic advisory experience with executives, customers, or partners
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field; cloud experience appears tactical rather than platform-strategy level

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI product track record
Extensive multi-domain engineering experience exceeding tenure requirement
No strategic/advisory leadership experience at director level
